tipRules.tip: KVD: 'For heaviest cover, vertical presentations: 3/4oz Hack Attack jig with Rage Craw trailer. Fast fall mimics bowling ball — prompts quick reaction, no time to think. Smaller trailer (Scon Bug, Menace) increases fall rate. For thickest mats, use big weight with single hook and punch bug instead — penetrates better than a flipping jig.'

KVD: 'Swim jig versatility: while casting and reeling, spot a target and pitch it into a bush, hole in the grass, or heavy cover — fish it like a flipping jig. Transition from horizontal to vertical presentation with the same bait. Always opt for heavier jig rather than lighter for the reaction strike advantage.'
